summary: Iteration-10 — Tested next_blog/newsletter launch-at countdown timers and host-profile-per-admin-user features. 31/31 backend tests pass (11 new + 20 regression). UI flows for Blog/Newsletter launch cards, Users tab host-profile expander, public StayTunedBanner countdown, Book-a-Call host picker modal, and Settings tab (legacy host editor removed) all verified end-to-end.

minor.issue: Contract mismatch with spec — spec claims 'empty labels are stripped server-side', but server returns 422 (Pydantic CustomField.label min_length=1). Either update spec or change validator to filter empty rows.

ui_bugs.issue: Anchors lack target=_blank attribute in DOM (likely uses window.open programmatically). Works, but right-click → 'open in new tab' won't honor the booking URL.

action_items: (MINOR) Decide between (a) loosening CustomField.label validator to filter empty rows server-side as the doc/agent-note claims OR (b) update the doc — current behavior returns 422 for empty labels.
(LOW) Consider adding target='_blank' + rel='noopener' to host 'Open calendar' anchors so middle-click / cmd-click works naturally.
critical_code_review_comments: _hosts_from_admin_users() correctly switches host source: when ≥1 admin has show_as_host=True AND booking_url set → derived; else fallback to app_settings.hosts (verified by toggling all 4 admins off and seeing legacy host appear in public response).
AdminUserUpdateIn now correctly supports partial updates — verified PUT with only {designation} did NOT clear booking_url or show_as_host on Rajesh.
Public /api/app-settings/public exposes next_blog_launch_at / next_newsletter_launch_at correctly; '' is accepted to clear (becomes null/empty).
Non-super-admin (info@) correctly receives 403 on PUT /api/app-settings and PUT /api/admin-users.
Login lockout 500 bug from iteration_9 is fixed — TestAdminLogin::test_lockout_after_5_fails passes.
test_credentials: Reset at end-of-run: swarag@/rajesh@/info@/support@orgainse.com + Orgainse25%Web.. (all must_change_password=true again, login_attempts cleared).
seed_data_creation: Restored Rajesh designation to 'Director, Delivery & Operations' (a partial-update test had set it to 'Director-<uuid>'). Cleared next_blog_launch_at / next_newsletter_launch_at on app_settings so a fresh iteration starts clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 admins are again on temp password Orgainse25%Web.. with must_change=true. Swarag + Rajesh remain show_as_host=true with their seeded Google Calendar booking_urls (visible in Book-a-Call modal). Next-launch timers are empty so /blog and /newsletter banners use the rolling ~30-day fallback. Host-picker modal data-testids are 'host-picker-card-<first-name-lower>' not 'host-card-<email>' — update test selectors accordingly. 'Open calendar' button likely uses window.open() rather than a normal <a target=_blank>.
rca of the issue: n/a — feature work verified, no critical bugs found.
